EPISODE_NARRATIVE: The combination of a abundant low to mid-level moisture and a strong upper-level trough created a favorable environment for the generation of organized shower and thunderstorm activity, which affected Saint Croix.
EVENT_NARRATIVE: Flooding was reported along the Melvin H. Evans Highway just north of the Henry E. Rohlson International Airport. Highway was impassable.

EPISODE_NARRATIVE: A tropical wave affected the area and resulted in numerous showers and thunderstorms.
EVENT_NARRATIVE: Twister was spotted at Corn Hill, south of Christiansted. Reporter indicated very loud noise and debris suctioned by the twister. Torrential rainfall was observed at the time twister was spotted.

EPISODE_NARRATIVE: A strong tropical wave resulted in heavy rainfall activity across Saint Thomas.
EVENT_NARRATIVE: Road Kranprindsens Gade was completely flooded. There were several stalled vehicles.

CZ_NAME: ST. THOMAS / ST. JOHN AND ADJACENT ISLANDS
EPISODE_NARRATIVE: Tropical Cyclone Dorian affected the area on August 28th. Dorian was upgraded from a tropical storm into a hurricane as the center of the storm moved across the USVI. Hurricane force winds were reported across Saint Thomas.
EVENT_NARRATIVE: St. Thomas ASOS reported a sustained wind of 53 MPH, gusts to 75 mph.

CZ_NAME: ST. THOMAS / ST. JOHN AND ADJACENT ISLANDS
EPISODE_NARRATIVE: Tropical Cyclone Dorian affected the area on August 28th. Dorian was upgraded from a tropical storm into a hurricane as the center of the storm moved across the USVI. Hurricane force winds were reported across Saint Thomas.
EVENT_NARRATIVE: Wxflow station XBUK, in Buck Island, St. Thomas reported a sustained wind of 82 mph, gusting to 111 mph.
